headline: Stronger Guidance And Bayer Tech Tie-Up Might Change The Case For Investing In Deere (DE)
summary: In late February 2026, Deere & Company reported first-quarter revenue of US$9,611 million and net income of US$656 million, raised its full-year 2026 earnings guidance to a range of US$4.5 billion to US$5.0 billion, declared a quarterly dividend of US$1.62 per share, and announced the results of its annual shareholder meeting where several shareholder proposals were not approved. Deere also highlighted its push into connected, data-driven farming through an integration between Bayer’s...

headline: Assessing Deere’s (DE) Valuation After Recent Share Price Momentum And Autonomy Growth Narrative
summary: Deere (DE) has drawn attention after recent share price moves, with the stock up about 19% over the past month and roughly 34% over the past 3 months. Investors are reassessing what that means for valuation today. See our latest analysis for Deere. Set against a 1 day share price return of 0.19% and a 7 day share price decline of 2.47%, Deere’s recent 30 day and year to date share price strength suggests that momentum has been building, supported by a 1 year total shareholder return of 37.28%...
